company_type: Internet Infrastructure and Domain Name Registry Services

dependencies: Internet service providers for DNS resolution connectivity
Regional internet registries (RIRs) for RPKI system
Data center facilities in Dulles Virginia, Ashburn Virginia, and New Castle Delaware
risks: Dependence on internet service providers and backbone providers for DNS connectivity
Vulnerabilities in global routing system (BGP protocol)
Route hijacks and route leaks beyond company control
RPKI system dependencies on regional internet registries
Data center concentration in same geographic region (Virginia/Delaware)
Single points of failure in Shared Registration System
Supplier vulnerabilities in third-party software and hardware
Risks from consultants, advisors, and contractors
Dependence on external technology systems and services

regulatory_risks: ICANN Consensus Policies and Temporary Policies requirements
U.S. Department of Commerce oversight of .com Registry Agreement
Pricing restrictions in .com and .net Registry Agreements
China Ministry of Industry and Information Technology licensing requirements
China regulations requiring government-issued licenses for each gTLD/ccTLD
China regulatory mandates making domain registration more difficult
EU GDPR compliance requirements if personal registrant data obtained
EU Network and Information Security Directive (NIS 2) implementation
Data transfer framework challenges between U.S. and EU
Data localization requirements in various jurisdictions
OFAC economic and trade sanctions compliance
Cybersecurity regulations in multiple jurisdictions
California data security and privacy regulations
UK data security and privacy regulations
Content-neutral operation requirements under Cooperative Agreement
IETF technical standards compliance requirements
Potential changes to multi-stakeholder internet governance model
OECD Pillar One and Pillar Two tax regulations
International digital services tax regimes
State income tax apportionment rule changes
Trade restrictions and tariff regulations
U.S. government data collection policy concerns internationally

sanction_risks: Political tensions between United States and China
U.S. tariffs or proposed tariffs on China
U.S. government restrictions on certain Chinese companies
Chinese government potential restrictions on non-Chinese companies
Trade barriers and restrictions in international locations
State suppression of internet operations risk
Terrorist groups targeting U.S. interests abroad
